name: Emerald Pet Chicky Twizzies Grain-Free Dog Treats
description: Give your furry friend a fun and tasty reward with Emerald Pet’s Chicky Twizzies! These savory chicken chews are rawhide-free, 100% digestible and have a natural smoky flavor your dog will go head over paws for. Made without dairy, grains, corn, wheat or soy, these limited ingredient treats are paw-sitively perfect for pups with sensitivities to certain ingredients. Best of all, they are 100% free of anything artificial and are made in the USA with ingredients from the USA! And with two sizes of delectable, long-lasting Twizzies to choose from, how can you go wrong?
